scenarios.description: load() returns DotenvImpl instance without systemProperties when systemProperties=false and empty .env file (loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary directory with an empty .env file at `<tempDir>/.env`; no mocking required

scenarios.description: load() returns DotenvImpl and sets no system properties when systemProperties=true but .env is empty (loop-0, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary directory with an empty .env file; no mocking required
scenarios.expectedResult: returned DotenvImpl.get("ANY_KEY") == null AND no new system property "ANY_KEY"

scenarios.description: load() returns DotenvImpl and sets one system property when systemProperties=true and .env has one entry (loop-1, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary directory with .env containing "FOO=bar"; no mocking required

scenarios.description: load() returns DotenvImpl with multiple entries and sets each as system property when systemProperties=true (loop-N, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary directory with .env containing "A=1" and "B=2" on separate lines; no mocking required
scenarios.expectedResult: returned DotenvImpl.get("A") == "1", get("B") == "2" AND System.getProperty("A") == "1", System.getProperty("B") == "2"

scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when .env file is missing and throwIfMissing=true
scenarios.precondition: Ensure no .env file exists in a unique temporary directory; no mocking required
